themes: Deone Walker on new defensive scheme
Dawson Knox talks Kincaid & new stadium
writeup: The Bills were recognized as a HEARTSafe Workplace by Erie County during National CPR & AED Awareness Week, with Damar Hamlin continuing his powerful advocacy around cardiac emergency preparedness. Second-year defensive tackle Deone Walker addressed media after OTA practice, expressing focus on adapting to defensive coordinator Jim Leonhard's scheme. Tight end Dawson Knox was upbeat about the overall state of the tight end room heading into 2026.

articles.title: Buffalo Bills earn HEARTSafe Workplace Designation
Deone Walker Talked With The Media After OTAs
Dawson Knox Talks After Bills OTAs
